text.title: Decision Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying decision-analysis. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.fix: Always include status quo; some decisions correctly conclude 'do not change'.

antipattern.root-cause: Stakeholders add criteria to defend pet preferences.
antipattern.fix: Cap at 7; merge or drop below-threshold criteria.

antipattern.symptom: Criteria invented at decision time, not traced.
antipattern.root-cause: Author skips traceability under time pressure.
antipattern.fix: Every criterion has trace_to_req; un-traced criterion is blocked.

antipattern.symptom: Stakeholders rerun with different methods until they like the outcome.
antipattern.fix: Lock method before scoring; method change requires explicit governance review.
